name: lib
description: Internal library containing the core logic, state management, and service integrations for the URekha platform.

subfolders.name: store
subfolders.description: Redux Toolkit configuration and data slices.

subfiles.name: index.ts
subfiles.description: Redux store initialization and root reducer.

subfiles.name: auth-slice.ts
subfiles.description: State management for user sessions and permissions.

subfiles.name: jyotisham-slice.ts
subfiles.description: State for astrological data and chart responses.

subfiles.name: modular-pipeline-slice.ts
subfiles.description: Tracking state for the asynchronous generation pipeline.

subfolders.name: pipeline
subfolders.description: Multi-stage orchestration for fetching and synthesizing astrological reports.

subfiles.name: modularOrchestrator.ts
subfiles.description: The primary engine for sequential/parallel prediction solving.

subfiles.name: userOrchestrator.ts
subfiles.description: User-facing wrapper for report generation requests.

subfiles.name: userPlansConfig.ts
subfiles.description: Feature gating and plan-based logic configurations.

subfiles.name: prediction-service.ts
subfiles.description: Client for the AI prediction engine.

subfiles.name: r2.ts
subfiles.description: Cloudflare R2 storage client for report persistence.
